name: dmatrix_server
_comment: d-Matrix single-server reference (8 cards × 8 chiplets = 64 chiplets), modeled at chiplet granularity. Identical per-chiplet device spec as `dmatrix.squadrack` (32 GB LPDDR5 @ 51.2 GB/s, 256 MB SRAM @ 18.75 TB/s, 300 TFLOPS MXINT8). Fabric chain stops at the 2-tier PCIe domain — no `ethernet_rack` tier — so collectives that fit within a server are bounded by the in-package mesh (tier 1) and the PCIe Gen5 server switch (tier 2) only. Use this system for workloads that fit in a single 8-card server (e.g., Llama-3-8B in Performance Mode per sram.md §3.2: 8 GB weights ≪ 16 GB aggregate SRAM across 64 chiplets, plenty of room for KV at small batch). For full-rack scale (Llama-3-70B), use `dmatrix.squadrack` which adds the JetStream/Ethernet tier 3 across servers.
